languages.text: "Да, Лорд-капитан". {n}Иокаста немедленно уводит Себериана — почтительно, но настойчиво придерживая за плечо.{/n}
"Yes, Lord Captain." {n}Sauerback immediately leads Seberian away, respectfully but firmly gripping him by the shoulder.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Да, Лорд-капитан". {n}Иокаста немедленно уводит Себериана — почтительно, но настойчиво придерживая за плечо.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Yes, Lord Captain." {n}Jocasta immediately leads Seberian away, respectfully but firmly gripping him by the shoulder.{/n}

languages.text: "Ja, Lord Captain." {n}Sauerback führt Seberian weg und legt ihm respektvoll aber bestimmt die Hand auf die Schulter.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes, Lord Captain." {n}Sauerback immediately leads Seberian away, respectfully but firmly gripping him by the shoulder.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ja, Lord Captain." {n}Sauerback führt Seberian weg und legt ihm respektvoll aber bestimmt die Hand auf die Schulter.{/n}

languages.text: « Oui, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. » {n}Sauerback se presse aux côtés de Seberian, le guidant avec respect tout en lui agrippant fermement l'épaule.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes, Lord Captain." {n}Sauerback immediately leads Seberian away, respectfully but firmly gripping him by the shoulder.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Oui, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. » {n}Sauerback se presse aux côtés de Seberian, le guidant avec respect tout en lui agrippant fermement l'épaule.{/n}

languages.text: «Sí, Lord Capitán». {n}Sauerback se lleva a Seberian de inmediato, agarrándolo del brazo con respeto, pero también con firmeza.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes, Lord Captain." {n}Sauerback immediately leads Seberian away, respectfully but firmly gripping him by the shoulder.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Sí, Lord Capitán». {n}Sauerback se lleva a Seberian de inmediato, agarrándolo del brazo con respeto, pero también con firmeza.{/n}

languages.text: "Evet Lord Kaptan." {n}Sauerback, saygılı ama sıkı bir şekilde omzundan tutarak Seberian'ı derhâl uzaklaştırıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes, Lord Captain." {n}Sauerback immediately leads Seberian away, respectfully but firmly gripping him by the shoulder.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Evet Lord Kaptan." {n}Sauerback, saygılı ama sıkı bir şekilde omzundan tutarak Seberian'ı derhâl uzaklaştırıyor.{/n}

languages.text: “是，舰长大人。”{n}苏尔贝克立即带塞贝里安离开，态度恭敬却不容拒绝地抓着他的肩膀。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes, Lord Captain." {n}Sauerback immediately leads Seberian away, respectfully but firmly gripping him by the shoulder.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “是，舰长大人。”{n}苏尔贝克立即带塞贝里安离开，态度恭敬却不容拒绝地抓着他的肩膀。{/n}

languages.text: 「はい、艦長様。」{n}ソーアバックはすぐにシベリアを連れて行き、肩をしっかりと握りながら敬意を払いながらも厳しく彼を導く。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes, Lord Captain." {n}Sauerback immediately leads Seberian away, respectfully but firmly gripping him by the shoulder.{/n}
